objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to engine display cartridge, tank modules, interstage datum, fairing split, avionics service bay, and visible non-functional flow-path labels.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if engine/tank service access or tank-to-engine flow readability is blocked.

constraint: tank modules slide out and the flow path remains visible through the cutaway

trade_off.gain: reduces separate shell-cover alignment operations while making internal layout readable
trade_off.guardrail: tank modules slide out and the flow path remains visible through the cutaway
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if engine/tank service access or tank-to-engine flow readability is blocked.

decision.rationale: integrate body shell halves with cutaway window and tank module slots

verification.check: tank modules slide out and the flow path remains visible through the cutaway

evolution.leaves_for_next: tank modules slide out and the flow path remains visible through the cutaway | mit: Keep engine display as a removable non-functional cartridge and use slide-in tank modules.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to engine display cartridge, tank modules, interstage datum, fairing split, avionics service bay, and visible non-functional flow-path labels.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if engine/tank service access or tank-to-engine flow readability is blocked.

constraint: labels are descriptive only and do not include working propulsion instructions

trade_off.gain: teaches tank-to-engine relationship without adding loose arrow tags
trade_off.guardrail: labels are descriptive only and do not include working propulsion instructions
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if engine/tank service access or tank-to-engine flow readability is blocked.

decision.rationale: integrate tank dummies with non-functional flow labels

verification.check: labels are descriptive only and do not include working propulsion instructions

evolution.leaves_for_next: labels are descriptive only and do not include working propulsion instructions | mit: Use a cutaway window and visible non-functional flow label strip.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to engine display cartridge, tank modules, interstage datum, fairing split, avionics service bay, and visible non-functional flow-path labels.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if engine/tank service access or tank-to-engine flow readability is blocked.

constraint: cartridge remains a non-functional display module

trade_off.gain: engine area can be inspected or swapped without rebuilding the body shell
trade_off.guardrail: cartridge remains a non-functional display module
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if engine/tank service access or tank-to-engine flow readability is blocked.

decision.rationale: keep engine display as a removable cartridge

verification.check: cartridge remains a non-functional display module

evolution.leaves_for_next: cartridge remains a non-functional display module | mit: Expose indexed interstage datum ring after assembly.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to engine display cartridge, tank modules, interstage datum, fairing split, avionics service bay, and visible non-functional flow-path labels.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if engine/tank service access or tank-to-engine flow readability is blocked.

constraint: datum face remains visible after upper stage installation

trade_off.gain: stage alignment is easier to teach and verify
trade_off.guardrail: datum face remains visible after upper stage installation
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if engine/tank service access or tank-to-engine flow readability is blocked.

verification.check: datum face remains visible after upper stage installation

evolution.leaves_for_next: datum face remains visible after upper stage installation | mit: Keep fairing halves and fins replaceable.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to engine display cartridge, tank modules, interstage datum, fairing split, avionics service bay, and visible non-functional flow-path labels.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if engine/tank service access or tank-to-engine flow readability is blocked.

constraint: fairing split and fin sockets stay accessible from outside

trade_off.gain: fragile external parts can be serviced after handling or display damage
trade_off.guardrail: fairing split and fin sockets stay accessible from outside
